resources.string: This app needs access to your %1$s to function correctly.
Access to %1$s is restricted by a device policy (such as parental controls or an MDM profile) and can\'t be changed from within this app or its Settings screen.
rememberPermissionController() was never composed into an Activity-hosted screen, so there\'s nowhere to show the system permission dialog.
the Info.plist usage-description key(s) for %1$s are missing.

the AndroidManifest is missing what %1$s needs -- a <uses-permission> declaration (for DoNotDisturbAccess: ACCESS_NOTIFICATION_POLICY), or a declared NotificationListenerService for NotificationListenerAccess.
the OS-level Health API is not available on this device (e.g. Health Connect is not installed on Android, or HealthKit is restricted on iOS).
You have denied %1$s permission. Please enable it in settings.
